@@ -43,6 +31,27 @@ struct AdvancedPane: View {
 
                 Divider()
 
+                SettingsSection(contentSpacing: 12) {
+                    Text("Display")
+                        .font(.caption)
+                        .foregroundStyle(.secondary)
+                        .textCase(.uppercase)
+                    PreferenceToggleRow(
+                        title: "Show usage as used",

+                    PreferenceToggleRow(
